Preferred Equipment Group 1WT

    Convenience

    • Cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; cruise control.

    • Steel wheels are economical and provide proven durability.

    Powertrain and Mechanical

    • Limited slip rear differential

    • Variable valve timing - Change your output. There are a lot of variables in your drive, so why should your engine always operate the same? With variable valve timing, the engine is efficient at both low and high RPM's, so you get better fuel efficiency, cleaner emissions and improved performance. Variable valve timing provides a better drive, every time.

This 2025 Chevrolet Silverado 3500HD Chassis Work Truck offered in Summit White will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

WT Convenience Package ($785 value)

  • Deep-Tinted Glass
  • Electric Rear-Window Defogger

Preferred Equipment Group 1WT

  • Solar Absorbing Tinted Glass
  • Rubberized-Vinyl Floor Covering
  • Bluetooth For Phone
  • Black Mirror Caps
  • Compass Located in Instrument Cluster
  • Manual Tilt Inside Rearview Mirror
  • Front Grille Bar with Black Mesh Inserts
  • Steering Wheel Mounted Electronic Cruise Control
  • 170 Amp Alternator
  • Manual Tilt-Wheel Steering Column
  • 2-Speed Electronic Shift Transfer Case
  • 3.5" Diagonal Monochromatic Display DIC
  • Black Front Bumper

Snow Plow Prep Package ($530 value)

  • 220 Amp Alternator
  • Skid Plates

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

This 2026 Chevrolet Silverado EV Max Range LT offered in Slate Gray Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group 4LT

  • Max Range Battery Pack

Convenience

  • Remote parking - Fit in anywhere! Remote parking system allows you to pull into or out of a space without having to be in the vehicle; simply use the remote control! It's perfect when the cars next to you are too close for you to be able open your doors. With remote parking, any spot is an open spot!
  • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. No Accidents! This 2021 Mercedes-Benz GLE GLE 350 6.2L Red Line offered in Selenite Grey Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

AMG Line Exterior ($2,900 value)

  • AMG Bodystyling
  • AMG Line Exterior

Night Package ($400 value)

  • Night Package Code

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

Technology and Telematics

  • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: Napleton Saint Charles Chevrolet is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2026 Chevrolet Equinox AWD LT offered in Mosaic Black Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Rear collision mitigation - It has your back. Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you. If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: ENGINE, 1.5L TURBO DOHC 4-CYLINDER, SIDI, VVT, MOSAIC BLACK METALLIC Napleton Saint Charles Chevrolet is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area. Option Group 01

    Convenience

    • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.

    Safety and Security

    • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Apple CarPlay & Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring

This 2024 Chevrolet Equinox RS 6.2L Red Line offered in Lakeshore Blue Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety & Infotainment Package ($1,200 value)

    Advanced Safety Package

    • Outside Heated Power-Adjustable Mirrors
    • Adaptive Cruise Control
    • HD Surround Vision

    Preferred Equipment Group 1RS

      Infotainment Package

      • 120-Volt Power Outlet
      • 2 USB Data Ports with SD Card Reader
      • 2 USB Data Ports
      • Heated Steering Wheel

      Safety and Security

      • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
      • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
      • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
      • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

      Technology and Telematics

      • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
      Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, ENGINE, 1.5L TURBO DOHC 4-CYLINDER, SIDI, VVT, TRANSMISSION, 6-SPEED AUTOMATIC, ELECTRONICALLY-CONTROLLED WITH OVERDRIVE, AXLE, 3.50 FINAL DRIVE RATIO, WHEELS, 19" (48.3 CM) ALUMINUM, SEATS, FRONT BUCKET, JET BLACK WITH RED ACCENTS, PREMIUM CLOTH SEAT TRIM, AUDIO SYSTEM, CHEVROLET INFOTAINMENT 3 PLUS SYSTEM, 8" DIAGONAL HD COLOR TOUCHSCREEN, SAFETY AND INFOTAINMENT PACKAGE, INFOTAINMENT PACKAGE, ADVANCED SAFETY PACKAGE, COLD AIR GRILLE SHUTTER, NOT EQUIPPED WITH SEASONAL LOWER GRILLE COVER., MIRRORS, OUTSIDE HEATED, POWER-ADJUSTABLE, MANUAL-FOLDING WITH INTEGRATED TURN SIGNAL INDICATORS, LICENSE PLATE FRONT MOUNTING PACKAGE, STEERING WHEEL, HEATED, ADAPTIVE CRUISE CONTROL, USB DATA PORTS, 2, LOCATED IN THE FRONT CONSOLE BIN, USB DATA PORTS, 2, POWER OUTLET, 120-VOLT, LOCATED ON THE REAR OF CENTER CONSOLE, HD SURROUND VISION Napleton Saint Charles Chevrolet is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2023 Hyundai Tucson SEL 6.2L Red Line offered in Shimmering Silver will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Option Group 01

    Convenience

    • Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and the vehicle ahead. It's stop/go feature automatically brings the vehicle to a stop if traffic stops and resumes distance pacing cruise when traffic starts to move again. Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go; your ultimate co-pilot.

    Safety and Security

    • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2024 Chevrolet Equinox LT 6.2L Red Line offered in Summit White will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group 1LT

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, ENGINE, 1.5L TURBO DOHC 4-CYLINDER, SIDI, VVT, TRANSMISSION, 6-SPEED AUTOMATIC, ELECTRONICALLY-CONTROLLED WITH OVERDRIVE, AXLE, 3.87 FINAL DRIVE RATIO, WHEELS, 17" (43.2 CM) ALUMINUM, TIRES, P225/65R17 ALL-SEASON BLACKWALL, SEATS, FRONT BUCKET, JET BLACK, PREMIUM CLOTH SEAT TRIM, AUDIO SYSTEM, CHEVROLET INFOTAINMENT 3 SYSTEM, 7" DIAGONAL COLOR TOUCHSCREEN, AM/FM STEREO., LPO, FLOOR LINER PACKAGE, SUNROOF, POWER, LUGGAGE RACK, SIDE RAILS, ROOF-MOUNTED, COLD AIR GRILLE SHUTTER, LPO, ALL-WEATHER FLOOR LINERS, LPO, INTEGRATED CARGO LINER Napleton Saint Charles Chevrolet is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area. Preferred Equipment Group 1RS

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Rear collision mitigation - It has your back. Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you. If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: STERLING GREY METALLIC Napleton Saint Charles Chevrolet is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area.     Convenience

    • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Hands-off cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now with hands-off cruise control simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles with minimal steering input from you. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-off cruise control.

    Technology and Telematics

Powertrain and Mechanical

  • Variable valve timing - Change your output. There are a lot of variables in your drive, so why should your engine always operate the same? With variable valve timing, the engine is efficient at both low and high RPM's, so you get better fuel efficiency, cleaner emissions and improved performance. Variable valve timing provides a better drive, every time.
  • An OHV (pushrod) engine typically generates low-end torque sooner than an OHC engine of similar size. Peak torque is achieved at a lower RPM in OHV engines than in other designs, providing good acceleration from a stop.

    Convenience

    • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Hands-off cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now with hands-off cruise control simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles with minimal steering input from you. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-off cruise control.

    Technology and Telematics

Safety and Security

  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Rear collision mitigation - It has your back. Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you. If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: MOSAIC BLACK METALLIC Napleton Saint Charles Chevrolet is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area. entry.ns0:dealership_address: 2015 E. Main St., Saint Charles, IL 60174
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2026 Chevrolet Trax ACTIV offered in Mosaic Black Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: MOSAIC BLACK METALLIC Napleton Saint Charles Chevrolet is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area.     Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2012 Chevrolet Avalanche LTZ 6.2L Red Line offered in Silver Ice Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Comfort

  • Ventilated front seats -That's cool. Ventilated front seats provides targeted cool air so you and your passenger can get comfortable quicker in hot weather. Getting comfortable is no sweat when you have ventilated front seats.

Convenience

  • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.

Safety and Security

  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

Technology and Telematics

  • Selective Internet access - a more focused delivery. Selective internet access allows you to tailor the features for your feed, such as sports scores, local news, or current weather. When it comes to getting what you want, selective internet access is a net gain.
Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, ENGINE, VORTEC 5.3L V8 SFI FLEXFUEL, TRANSMISSION, 6-SPEED AUTOMATIC, REAR AXLE, 3.42 RATIO, WHEELS, 4 - 20" X 8.5" (50.8 CM X 21.6 CM) CHROME, TIRES, P275/55R20, ALL-SEASON, BLACKWALL, SILVER ICE METALLIC, SEATS, FRONT BUCKET, EBONY, CUSTOM PERFORATED LEATHER-APPOINTED, AUDIO SYSTEM WITH NAVIGATION, AM/FM/SIRIUSXM STEREO WITH CD PLAYER, SUN, ENTERTAINMENT AND DESTINATIONS PACKAGE, TRAILERING PACKAGE, HEAVY-DUTY, ENGINE BLOCK HEATER, COOLING, EXTERNAL ENGINE OIL COOLER, COOLING, EXTERNAL TRANSMISSION OIL COOLER, TRAILER BRAKE CONTROLLER, SUNROOF, POWER, TILT-SLIDING, BODY-COLORED EXTERIOR COMPONENTS, LICENSE PLATE PROVISION, FRONT, ENTERTAINMENT SYSTEM, REAR SEAT DVD PLAYER Napleton Saint Charles Chevrolet is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area. entry.title: 2021 Dodge Challenger R/T Scat Pack
entry.ns0:dealership_address: 2015 E. Main St., Saint Charles, IL 60174
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This isn't a base Scat Pack. This is a fully-optioned, factory-built T/A Widebody with over $17,000 in factory packages - and only 12,364 miles on the clock. Under the hood: The 6.4L SRT HEMI V8 paired with a 6-speed Tremec manual transmission delivers 485 horsepower the way it was meant to be delivered - by hand. Add a MOPAR Cold Air Intake (factory-installed as part of the T/A Package) and you have a car that pulls hard and sounds right. The Widebody Packages ($11,990 in factory options): Both the 23N and 24N Widebody packages are on this car - that means Brembo 6-piston fixed front calipers, Widebody fender flares, 305/35ZR20 Pirelli performance tires on 20x11 Devil's Rim aluminum wheels, Widebody Competition Suspension, Adaptive Damping Suspension, a flat-bottom steering wheel, and a Performance Shift Indicator. This is the full track-day setup from the factory. T/A Package ($3,995): Illuminated Air-Catcher headlamps, functional hood scoop, Black Satin painted hood, Satin Wrap roof and decklid, T/A bodyside graphics, 392 fender decals, rear black spoiler, and the signature Houndstooth Cloth Performance Seats with a White Face instrument cluster and gloss black trim rings. Rear Seat Delete: This car was optioned without rear seats - keeping weight down and making the cabin purpose-built for performance driving. Harman/Kardon Audio Group ($1,795): 18-speaker premium surround sound system with GreenEdge amp and trunk-mounted subwoofer. Because driving fast shouldn't mean sacrificing sound. Additional highlights: Heated and ventilated front seats, heated flat-bottom steering wheel, red Brembo brake calipers, blind One owner. Low miles. Built the way Dodge intended it - and optioned the way most buyers only wish theirs was. Feel free to swap in your preferred call-to-action at the close, or drop the dealership contact/address back in at the bottom per your standard format. The lead is now the car, not the store.     • Wireless connectivity - Strike the cord. Wireless technology makes it easy to place calls without having to fumble with your phone. It integrates your device with the system inside your vehicle for hands-free access. Keep connected and keep your hands on the wheel with wireless connectivity.

Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2026 Chevrolet Corvette 3LZ offered in Black will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group 3LZ

  • GT2 Bucket Seats
  • Driver Power Bolster Seat Adjuster
  • Passenger Power Bolster Seat Adjuster
  • Power Driver Lumbar Control Seat Adjuster
  • 2 Cargo Nets
  • Memory Driver and Passenger Convenience Package
  • Power Passenger Lumbar Control Seat Adjuster
  • Power-Adjustable Outside Heated Mirrors
  • Custom Leather Wrapped Interior Package
  • Sueded Microfiber-Wrapped Upper Interior Trim Package
  • Wireless Phone Charging
  • Heated Steering Wheel
  • Heated and Vented Driver and Passenger Seats
  • Rear Cross Traffic Alert
  • Side Blind Zone Alert
  • Universal Home Remote
  • Bose Performance Series Sound System with 14 Speakers
  • Performance Data and Video Recorder
  • Electrical Theft Deterrent System
  • Vehicle Inclination Theft Deterrent Sensor
  • Vehicle Interior Movement Theft Deterrent Sensor
  • HD Front and Rear Vision Cameras

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, 50-STATE CERTIFIED, ENGINE, 5.5L V8 DI, HIGH-OUTPUT, TRANSMISSION, 8-SPEED DUAL CLUTCH, INCLUDES MANUAL AND AUTO MODES, WHEELS, 20" X 10" (50.8 CM X 25.4 CM) FRONT AND 21" X 13" (53.3 CM X 33 CM) REAR SPIDER DESIGN, BLACK FORGED ALUMINUM, TIRES, 275/30ZR20 FRONT AND 345/25ZR21 REAR, BLACKWALL, HIGH PERFORMANCE, BLACK, SEATS, GT2 BUCKET, JET BLACK, NAPA LEATHER SEATING SURFACES WITH PERFORATED INSERTS, SEAT BELT COLOR, BLACK, LPO, ENGINE SPECIFICATION PLAQUE, BATTERY PROTECTION PACKAGE, FRONT LIFT ADJUSTABLE HEIGHT WITH MEMORY, EXHAUST TIPS, BLACK, LPO, BLACK LUG NUTS, LPO, THREE-STANCHION HIGH WING SPOILER, CARBON FLASH METALLIC-PAINTED, LPO, FRONT RADIATOR GRILLE SCREENS, HEADLAMP CONTROL, AUTOMATIC LEVELING SYSTEM, LPO, DARK STEALTH CROSSED FLAGS EMBLEMS, FRONT AND REAR, LICENSE PLATE BRACKET, FRONT, STEALTH INTERIOR TRIM PACKAGE, LPO, ALL-WEATHER FLOOR LINERS Napleton Saint Charles Chevrolet is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area. Give us a call at 630-296-9147 or stop by to test drive your new car, truck, or SUV today! 2015 E Main St St. Charles IL 60174 Napleton Autos Online Pricing Disclaimer New vehicle inventory is offered for sale at the Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP), as set by General Motors and/or General Motors Financial. Prices labeled as the "Napleton Price" include all eligible dealer discounts and/or manufacturer incentives and do not include taxes, title, license fees, documentation fees, optional equipment, or dealer-installed accessories selected by the customer at the time of purchase. Destination charges may vary by model and are included in the displayed pricing. All pricing is subject to change without notice based on manufacturer program updates, incentive eligibility, or market conditions. Napleton Autos advertises its inventory on this website, www.napleton.autos, as well as on third-party advertising platforms. Pricing is specific to each vehicle, identified by its Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) and dealer stock number. The pricing shown on www.napleton.autos represents the most current and accurate pricing for Napleton Autos. In the event of any discrepancy between this website and any third-party website, the pricing displayed on www.napleton.autos will be considered the most accurate and will supersede all other advertised prices. The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2015 Nissan Armada Platinum 6.2L Red Line offered in Magnetic Black will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Convenience

  • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.
  • Power open and close liftgate - On-demand access. When your arms are full of cargo, the last thing you want to do is set it all down just to open the liftgate, then pick it all back up to load it in. By remotely opening and closing, power liftgate lets you skip straight to the loading. It also eliminates the awkward stretch to reach up for the liftgate to close it. Load and go with power open and close liftgate.

Safety and Security

  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

Technology and Telematics

  • Voice activated integrated navigation system - A to B made easy! Whether it's an errand or a road trip, the voice activated integrated navigation system will guide you to your destination. No more bulky, impossible-to-fold maps, and no more stopping to ask for directions. Just tell it where you want to go, and the voice activated integrated navigation system shows you the right way.
Other notable features: ENGINE: 5.6L DOHC 32V ENDURANCE V8 W/FFV, MAGNETIC BLACK, CHARCOAL, LEATHER-APPOINTED SEAT TRIM, [C02] FEDERAL EMISSIONS, [X01] 2ND ROW CAPTAIN SEAT PACKAGE, [H11] DUAL DVD HEAD RESTRAINT MONITORS (H11), [Z66] ACTIVATION DISCLAIMER Napleton Saint Charles Chevrolet is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area. Convenience

  • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.

Powertrain and Mechanical

  • All wheel drive - all weather drive. In wet or slippery conditions the more grip your wheels can maintain, the safer your drive. All wheel drive powers both the front and rear axles, allowing the center differential to redirect power to the wheels with greater traction when slip is detected. So get a firm grip on the road, better acceleration and added peace of mind in poor weather conditions with all-wheel drive.
  • All wheel drive - all weather drive. In wet or slippery conditions the more grip your wheels can maintain, the safer your drive. All wheel drive powers both the front and rear axles, allowing the center differential to redirect power to the wheels with greater traction when slip is detected. So get a firm grip on the road, better acceleration and added peace of mind in poor weather conditions with all-wheel drive.
  • The Flat-4 (also known as boxer or horizontally-opposed) engine design produces less vibration than conventional designs. Its low center of gravity contributes to increased handling stability. Its lower height offers packaging advantages.

Safety and Security

  • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

This 2023 Volkswagen Tiguan SE R-Line Black 6.2L Red Line offered in Deep Black Pearl will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Tiguan Protection Package (2-Row) ($406 value)

  • Two-Row Rubber Monster Mats with Logo Kit (set of 4)
  • Luggage Net For Cargo Area

Convenience

  • Unresponsive driver assistant - a reaction to inaction. Maybe you fell asleep. Maybe you lost consciousness. No matter how it happens, Unresponsive driver assistant works to help lessen the danger when it does. It detects prolonged driver unresponsiveness, automatically bringing the vehicle to a stop and turning on the hazard lights. If equipped, emergency services will also be contacted. Unresponsive driver assistant is safety that never sleeps.

Safety and Security

  • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

Technology and Telematics

  • Wireless App-Connect (w/Apple CarPlay, Android Auto & MirrorLink) smart device wireless mirroring

    • Power 4-way driver lumbar - It's got your back. How you feel while driving is just as important as how your car drives. Enhance your comfort with power 4-way driver driver lumbar. Simply set it to the support you want for your lower back, and it will reduce the strain you would feel otherwise. Power 4-way driver lumbar supports your right to drive comfortably.

    Convenience

    • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.

    Safety and Security

    • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Selective Internet access - a more focused delivery. Selective internet access allows you to tailor the features for your feed, such as sports scores, local news, or current weather. When it comes to getting what you want, selective internet access is a net gain.

The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2027 Chevrolet Equinox AWD LT offered in Lakeshore Blue Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: ENGINE, 1.5L TURBO DOHC 4-CYLINDER, SIDI, VVT, LAKESHORE BLUE METALLIC Napleton Saint Charles Chevrolet is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area.
